evr.name: CdhCore.cmdDisp.OpCodeDispatched
evr.description: Op code dispatched event

evr.name: CdhCore.cmdDisp.OpCodeCompleted
evr.description: Op code completed event

evr.name: CdhCore.cmdDisp.OpCodeError
evr.description: Op code completed with error event

evr.name: CdhCore.cmdDisp.MalformedCommand
evr.description: Received a malformed command packet

evr.name: CdhCore.cmdDisp.InvalidCommand
evr.description: Received an invalid opcode

evr.name: CdhCore.cmdDisp.TooManyCommands
evr.description: Exceeded the number of commands that can be simultaneously executed

evr.name: CdhCore.cmdDisp.NoOpReceived
evr.description: The command dispatcher has successfully received a NO-OP command

evr.name: CdhCore.cmdDisp.NoOpStringReceived
evr.description: The command dispatcher has successfully received a NO-OP command from GUI with a string

evr.name: CdhCore.cmdDisp.TestCmd1Args
evr.description: This log event message returns the TEST_CMD_1 arguments.

evr.name: CdhCore.cmdDisp.OpCodeReregistered
evr.description: Op code reregistered event

evr.name: CdhCore.events.SEVERITY_FILTER_STATE
evr.description: Dump severity filter state

evr.name: CdhCore.events.ID_FILTER_ENABLED
evr.description: Indicate ID is filtered

evr.name: CdhCore.events.ID_FILTER_LIST_FULL
evr.description: Attempted to add ID to full ID filter ID

evr.name: CdhCore.events.ID_FILTER_REMOVED
evr.description: Removed an ID from the filter

evr.name: CdhCore.events.ID_FILTER_NOT_FOUND
evr.description: ID not in filter

evr.name: CdhCore.health.HLTH_PING_WARN
evr.description: Warn that a ping target is longer than the warning value

evr.name: CdhCore.health.HLTH_PING_LATE
evr.description: Declare FATAL since task is no longer responding

evr.name: CdhCore.health.HLTH_PING_WRONG_KEY
evr.description: Declare FATAL since task is no longer responding

evr.name: CdhCore.health.HLTH_CHECK_ENABLE
evr.description: Report checking turned on or off

evr.name: CdhCore.health.HLTH_CHECK_PING
evr.description: Report a particular entry on or off

evr.name: CdhCore.health.HLTH_CHECK_LOOKUP_ERROR
evr.description: Entry was not found

evr.name: CdhCore.health.HLTH_PING_UPDATED
evr.description: Report changed ping

evr.name: CdhCore.health.HLTH_PING_INVALID_VALUES
evr.description: Report changed ping

evr.name: CdhCore.version.FrameworkVersion
evr.description: Version of the git repository.

evr.name: CdhCore.version.ProjectVersion
evr.description: Version of the git repository.

evr.name: CdhCore.version.LibraryVersions
evr.description: Version of the git repository.

evr.name: CdhCore.version.CustomVersions
evr.description: Version of the git repository.

evr.name: CdhCore.fatalAdapter.AF_ASSERT_0
evr.description: An assert happened

evr.name: CdhCore.fatalAdapter.AF_ASSERT_1
evr.description: An assert happened

evr.name: CdhCore.fatalAdapter.AF_ASSERT_2
evr.description: An assert happened

evr.name: CdhCore.fatalAdapter.AF_ASSERT_3
evr.description: An assert happened

evr.name: CdhCore.fatalAdapter.AF_ASSERT_4
evr.description: An assert happened

evr.name: CdhCore.fatalAdapter.AF_ASSERT_5
evr.description: An assert happened

evr.name: CdhCore.fatalAdapter.AF_ASSERT_6
evr.description: An assert happened

evr.name: CdhCore.fatalAdapter.AF_UNEXPECTED_ASSERT
evr.description: An unexpected assert happened

evr.name: ComCcsds.comQueue.QueueOverflow
evr.description: Queue overflow event

evr.name: ComCcsds.frameAccumulator.NoBufferAvailable
evr.description: An error occurred while deserializing a packet

evr.name: ComCcsds.commsBufferManager.NoBuffsAvailable
evr.description: The BufferManager was unable to allocate a requested buffer

evr.name: ComCcsds.commsBufferManager.NullEmptyBuffer
evr.description: The buffer manager received a null pointer and zero-sized buffer as a return. Probably undetected failed buffer allocation

evr.name: ComCcsds.fprimeRouter.SerializationError
evr.description: An error occurred while serializing a com buffer

evr.name: ComCcsds.fprimeRouter.DeserializationError
evr.description: An error occurred while deserializing a packet

evr.name: ComCcsds.tcDeframer.InvalidSpacecraftId
evr.description: Deframing received an invalid SCID

evr.name: ComCcsds.tcDeframer.InvalidFrameLength
evr.description: Deframing received an invalid frame length

evr.name: ComCcsds.tcDeframer.InvalidVcId
evr.description: Deframing received an invalid VCID

evr.name: ComCcsds.tcDeframer.InvalidCrc
evr.description: Deframing received an invalid checksum

evr.name: ComCcsds.spacePacketDeframer.InvalidLength
evr.description: Deframing received an invalid frame length

evr.name: ComCcsds.apidManager.UnexpectedSequenceCount
evr.description: Deframing received an unexpected sequence count

evr.name: ComCcsds.apidManager.ApidTableFull
evr.description: Received an unregistered APID

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.DirectoryOpenError
evr.description: Error opening directory

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.ProcessingDirectory
evr.description: Processing directory

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.ProcessingFile
evr.description: Processing directory

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.ProcessingDirectoryComplete
evr.description: Directory Processing complete

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.CatalogBuildComplete
evr.description: Catalog processing complete

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.CatalogXmitStarted
evr.description: Catalog transmission started

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.CatalogXmitStopped
evr.description: Catalog transmission stopped

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.CatalogXmitCompleted
evr.description: Catalog transmission completed

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.SendingProduct
evr.description: Sending product

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.ProductComplete
evr.description: Product send complete

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.ComponentNotInitialized
evr.description: Component not initialized error

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.ComponentNoMemory
evr.description: Component didn't get memory error

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.CatalogFull
evr.description: Catalog is full

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.FileOpenError
evr.description: Error opening file

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.FileReadError
evr.description: Error opening file

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.FileHdrError
evr.description: Error reading header data from DP file

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.FileHdrDesError
evr.description: Error deserializing header data

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.DpInsertError
evr.description: Error inserting entry into list

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.DpDuplicate
evr.description: Error inserting entry into list

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.DpCatalogFull
evr.description: Error inserting entry into list

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.DpXmitInProgress
evr.description: Tried to build catalog while downlink process active

evr.name: DataProducts.dpCat.FileSizeError
evr.description: Error getting file size

evr.name: DataProducts.dpMgr.BufferAllocationFailed
evr.description: Buffer allocation failed

evr.name: DataProducts.dpWriter.InvalidBuffer
evr.description: Received buffer is invalid

evr.name: DataProducts.dpWriter.BufferTooSmallForPacket
evr.description: Received buffer is too small to hold a data product packet

evr.name: DataProducts.dpWriter.InvalidHeaderHash
evr.description: The received buffer has an invalid header hash

evr.name: DataProducts.dpWriter.InvalidHeader
evr.description: Error occurred when deserializing the packet header

evr.name: DataProducts.dpWriter.BufferTooSmallForData
evr.description: Received buffer is too small to hold the data specified in the header

evr.name: DataProducts.dpWriter.FileOpenError
evr.description: An error occurred when opening a file

evr.name: DataProducts.dpWriter.FileWriteError
evr.description: An error occurred when writing to a file

evr.name: DataProducts.dpWriter.FileWritten
evr.description: File written

evr.name: DataProducts.dpBufferManager.NoBuffsAvailable
evr.description: The BufferManager was unable to allocate a requested buffer

evr.name: DataProducts.dpBufferManager.NullEmptyBuffer
evr.description: The buffer manager received a null pointer and zero-sized buffer as a return. Probably undetected failed buffer allocation

evr.name: FileHandling.fileUplink.BadChecksum
evr.description: During receipt of a file, the computed checksum value did not match the stored value

evr.name: FileHandling.fileUplink.FileOpenError
evr.description: An error occurred opening a file

evr.name: FileHandling.fileUplink.FileReceived
evr.description: The File Uplink component successfully received a file

evr.name: FileHandling.fileUplink.FileWriteError
evr.description: An error occurred writing to a file

evr.name: FileHandling.fileUplink.InvalidReceiveMode
evr.description: The File Uplink component received a packet with a type that was invalid for the current receive mode

evr.name: FileHandling.fileUplink.PacketOutOfBounds
evr.description: During receipt of a file, the File Uplink component encountered a packet with offset and size out of bounds for the current file

evr.name: FileHandling.fileUplink.PacketOutOfOrder
evr.description: The File Uplink component encountered an out-of-order packet during file receipt

evr.name: FileHandling.fileUplink.PacketDuplicate
evr.description: The File Uplink component encountered a duplicate packet during file receipt

evr.name: FileHandling.fileUplink.UplinkCanceled
evr.description: The File Uplink component received a CANCEL packet

evr.name: FileHandling.fileUplink.DecodeError
evr.description: Error decoding file packet

evr.name: FileHandling.fileUplink.InvalidPacketReceived
evr.description: Invalid packet received

evr.name: FileHandling.fileDownlink.FileOpenError
evr.description: An error occurred opening a file

evr.name: FileHandling.fileDownlink.FileReadError
evr.description: An error occurred reading a file

evr.name: FileHandling.fileDownlink.FileSent
evr.description: The File Downlink component successfully sent a file

evr.name: FileHandling.fileDownlink.DownlinkCanceled
evr.description: The File Downlink component canceled downlink of a file

evr.name: FileHandling.fileDownlink.DownlinkTimeout
evr.description: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.

evr.name: FileHandling.fileDownlink.DownlinkPartialWarning
evr.description: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.

evr.name: FileHandling.fileDownlink.DownlinkPartialFail
evr.description: The File Downlink component has detected a timeout. Downlink has been canceled.

evr.name: FileHandling.fileDownlink.SendDataFail
evr.description: The File Downlink component generated an error when trying to send a data packet.

evr.name: FileHandling.fileDownlink.SendStarted
evr.description: The File Downlink component started a file download.

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.DirectoryCreateError
evr.description: An error occurred while attempting to create a directory

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.DirectoryRemoveError
evr.description: An error occurred while attempting to remove a directory

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.FileMoveError
evr.description: An error occurred while attempting to move a file

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.FileRemoveError
evr.description: An error occurred while attempting to remove a file

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.ShellCommandFailed
evr.description: The File System component executed a shell command that returned status non-zero

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.AppendFileFailed
evr.description: The File System component returned status non-zero when trying to append 2 files together

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.AppendFileSucceeded
evr.description: The File System component appended 2 files without error

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.ShellCommandSucceeded
evr.description: The File System component executed a shell command that returned status zero

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.CreateDirectorySucceeded
evr.description: The File System component created a new directory without error

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.RemoveDirectorySucceeded
evr.description: The File System component deleted and existing directory without error

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.MoveFileSucceeded
evr.description: The File System component moved a file to a new location without error

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.RemoveFileSucceeded
evr.description: The File System component deleted an existing file without error

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.AppendFileStarted
evr.description: The File System component appended 2 files without error

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.ShellCommandStarted
evr.description: The File System component began executing a shell command

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.CreateDirectoryStarted
evr.description: The File System component began creating a new directory

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.RemoveDirectoryStarted
evr.description: The File System component began deleting a directory

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.MoveFileStarted
evr.description: The File System component began moving a file to a new location

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.RemoveFileStarted
evr.description: The File System component began deleting an existing file

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.FileSizeSucceeded
evr.description: File size response

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.FileSizeError
evr.description: Failed to get file size

evr.name: FileHandling.fileManager.FileSizeStarted
evr.description: Checking file size

evr.name: FileHandling.prmDb.PrmIdNotFound
evr.description: Parameter ID not found in database.

evr.name: FileHandling.prmDb.PrmIdUpdated
evr.description: Parameter ID updated in database

evr.name: FileHandling.prmDb.PrmDbFull
evr.description: Parameter database is full

evr.name: FileHandling.prmDb.PrmIdAdded
evr.description: Parameter ID added to database

evr.name: FileHandling.prmDb.PrmFileWriteError
evr.description: Failed to write parameter file

evr.name: FileHandling.prmDb.PrmFileSaveComplete
evr.description: Save of parameter file completed

evr.name: FileHandling.prmDb.PrmFileReadError
evr.description: Failed to read parameter file

evr.name: FileHandling.prmDb.PrmFileLoadComplete
evr.description: Load of parameter file completed

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.rateGroup1.RateGroupStarted
evr.description: Informational event that rate group has started

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.rateGroup1.RateGroupCycleSlip
evr.description: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.rateGroup2.RateGroupStarted
evr.description: Informational event that rate group has started

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.rateGroup2.RateGroupCycleSlip
evr.description: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.rateGroup3.RateGroupStarted
evr.description: Informational event that rate group has started

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.rateGroup3.RateGroupCycleSlip
evr.description: Warning event that rate group has had a cycle slip

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_SequenceLoaded
evr.description: Sequence file was successfully loaded.

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_SequenceCanceled
evr.description: A command sequence was successfully canceled.

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_FileReadError
evr.description: The Sequence File Loader could not read the sequence file.

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_FileInvalid
evr.description: The sequence file format was invalid.

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_RecordInvalid
evr.description: The format of a command record was invalid.

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_FileSizeError
evr.description: The sequence file was too large.

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_FileNotFound
evr.description: The sequence file was not found

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_FileCrcFailure
evr.description: The sequence file validation failed

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_CommandComplete
evr.description: The Command Sequencer issued a command and received a success status in return.

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_SequenceComplete
evr.description: A command sequence successfully completed.

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_CommandError
evr.description: The Command Sequencer issued a command and received an error status in return.

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_InvalidMode
evr.description: The Command Sequencer received a command that was invalid for its current mode.

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_RecordMismatch
evr.description: Number of records in header doesn't match number in file

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_TimeBaseMismatch
evr.description: The running time base doesn't match the time base in the sequence files

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_TimeContextMismatch
evr.description: The running time base doesn't match the time base in the sequence files

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_PortSequenceStarted
evr.description: A local port request to run a sequence was started

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_UnexpectedCompletion
evr.description: A command status came back when no sequence was running

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_ModeSwitched
evr.description: Switched step mode

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_NoSequenceActive
evr.description: A sequence related command came with no active sequence

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_SequenceValid
evr.description: A sequence passed validation

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_SequenceTimeout
evr.description: A sequence passed validation

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_CmdStepped
evr.description: A command in a sequence was stepped through

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_CmdStarted
evr.description: A manual sequence was started

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_JoinWaiting
evr.description: Wait for the current running sequence file complete

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.cmdSeq.CS_JoinWaitingNotComplete
evr.description: Cannot run new sequence when current sequence file is still running.

evr.name: HelloWorldDeployment.helloWorld.Hello
evr.description: Greeting event with maximum greeting length of 20 characters
